title: Save the President : Trust Issues
description:
Save the President: Trust Issues is a fast-paced social deduction party game for 5–10 players online, set in a multi-story house where no one knows who truly matters.

One player is the President — but their identity is hidden. If the President dies, everyone loses. While the Killer hunts in silence, Agents and Citizens must complete critical tasks, repair failing systems, and question every suspicious move.

STRIKE IN SILENCE

REPAIR THE SYSTEMS — BUT WATCH YOUR BACK

CONTROL THE CAMERAS

CAMERAS LET YOU WATCH — NOT SEE

TRUST THE WRONG PERSON — AND IT'S OVER
description_short: A fast-paced social deduction party game for 4–10 players — grab your friends and play online together. One player is the President - but no one knows who. Protect them, complete tasks, and unmask the Killer hiding in plain sight. Accuse carefully: one wrong guess ends the game.
